name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve

<!--
If it is urgent, please contact your FANUC representative directly.

Common issues are described in the official documentation.
https://fanuc-corporation.github.io/fanuc_driver_doc/main/docs/troubleshooting/troubleshooting.html
-->

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Console log**
Add full console log on the terminal  to help explain your problem.

**Alarms**
Put recent alarms here shown on the alarm screen on the robot controller.

**Software (please complete the following information):**

- fanuc_driver: [e.g. v1.2.0]
- fanuc_description: [e.g. v1.2.0]
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- OS Environment: [e.g. Physical machine, Virtual machine (docker, WSL2, etc.) ]
- Robot model [e.g. CRX-10iA/L]
- Robot controller: [e.g. R-30iB Mini Plus, ROBOGUIDE]
- Controller software version: [e.g. V9.40P/85, V10.10P/30]
- ROBOGUIDE version: [e.g. Rev. E SR1 (if Robot controller is ROBOGUIDE) ]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
